svg.title: Feature Forge pipeline
svg.desc: The Feature Forge pipeline stages flow left to right: forge-0-epic (optional) into forge-1-prd, forge-2-tech, forge-3-specs, then a forge-verify gate, forge-4-backlog, another forge-verify gate, forge-5-loop, a final forge-verify gate, and forge-6-docs. The forge-verify gates run between stages to catch gaps before they reach downstream work.
